[category]
matching
[prompt]
In Alice's Wonderland, secret processing rules are used on text.

x: not matched anywhere
y: matched but wrong position

0 00101001 3
1 00000000 a
2 00001000 1
3 10000000 1
4 00000100 1
5 10000000 1
6 00100101 3
7 00100000 1

01 10 00100000 1 match 7
12 21 00100000 1 match 7
23 32 00100000 1 match 7
34 43 00100010 2
45 54 10000000 1 match 3 5
56 65 01010000 2
67 76 00001000 1 match 2
70 07 00000000 a match 1

13 31 00100000 1 match 7
24 42 00101001 3 match 0
35 53 00000000 a match 1
46 64 00001000 1 match 2
57 75 10000000 1 match 3 5
60 06 00000100 1 match 4
71 17 10000000 1 match 3 5

25 52 00000000 a match 1
36 63 00000000 a match 1
47 74 10001000 2
50 05 00000000 a match 1
61 16 00010000 1
72 27 00001000 1 match 2

37 73 00000000 a match 1
